untranslatable_reason: This is a system design philosophy statement, not a position sizing rule. It describes the order of operations (define objectives before building system) and mentions target return/max loss as inputs to system design, but contains no specific sizing methodology, thresholds, or formulas for determining position size. The parameters provided (75% target return, 15% max loss, 5.0 risk-reward ratio) are system design goals, not sizing instructions.
